use_cases: Showcasing fashion and luxury brand collections with elegant imagery
Displaying product galleries with contextual descriptions and accent colors
Creating immersive visual narratives for editorial content
Auto-advancing through curated image content with pause control
Building fashion lookbook experiences with thematic groupings
ai_summary: An elegant image carousel component designed for showcasing fashion collections and luxury brand content. Features automatic slide advancement with progress tracking, pause functionality, and smooth transitions between themed slides. Each slide displays a full-bleed image with title, subtitle, description, and accent color styling. Optimized for e-commerce, editorial media, and creative industries requiring sophisticated visual presentation.
